chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

text: كُنْتُ أَنَا وَ هِشَامُ بْنُ الْحَكَمِ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ يَقْطِينٍ بِبَغْدَادَ فَقَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ يَقْطِينٍ كُنْتُ عِنْدَ الْعَبْدِ الصَّالِحِ جَالِساً فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ ابْنُهُ عَلِيٌّ فَقَالَ لِي يَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ يَقْطِينٍ هَذَا عَلِيٌّ سَيِّدُ وُلْدِي أَمَا إِنِّي قَدْ نَحَلْتُهُ كُنْيَتِي فَضَرَبَ هِشَامُ بْنُ الْحَكَمِ بِرَاحَتِهِ جَبْهَتَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ وَيْحَكَ كَيْفَ قُلْتَ فَقَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ يَقْطِينٍ سَمِعْتُ وَ اللَّهِ مِنْهُ كَمَا قُلْتُ فَقَالَ هِشَامٌ أَخْبَرَكَ أَنَّ الْأَمْرَ فِيهِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ .

أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ نُعَيْمٍ الصَّحَّافِ قَالَ كُنْتُ عِنْدَ الْعَبْدِ الصَّالِحِ وَ فِي نُسْخَةِ الصَّفْوَانِيِّ قَالَ كُنْتُ أَنَا ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ مِثْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al Husayn Bin Nuaym Al Sahhaf who said,

‘I, and Hisham Bin Al-Hakam, and Ali Bin Yaqteen were at Baghdad, so Ali Bin Yaqteen said, ‘I was seated in the presence of Abd Al-Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), and his<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> Ali<sup>asws</sup> came over to him<sup>asws</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘O Ali Bin Yaqteen! This Ali<sup>asws</sup>, is the chief of my<sup>asws</sup> children. As for I<sup>asws</sup>, I<sup>asws</sup> have gifted him<sup>asws</sup> my<sup>asws</sup> teknonym’. So Hisham Bin Al-Hakam touched his forehead by his palm, then said, ‘Woe be unto you! How?’ I said, ‘Ali Bin Yaqteen said he heard it, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, from him<sup>asws</sup> just as he said’. So Hisham said, ‘Did he inform you that the command (Imamate) is in him<sup>asws</sup> from after him<sup>asws</sup>?’

Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Al-Husayn Bin Nuaym Al-Sahhaf who said, ‘I was in the presence of Al-Abd Al-Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)’. And in a copy of Al-Safwany, he said, ‘I was’, then mentioned similar to it.
en.sarwar: Ahmad ibn Mihran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from al-Husayn ibn Nu‘aym al-Sahhaf who has said the following. “Once I was in the presence of the pious servant (of Allah).In al-Safwani manuscript it says, “I was then he relates the rest of the above hadith.”
